{{Quote|I can see why Narmle eventually gave up on colonizing this place. I haven't seen such an overgrown planet in a long time.|[[Dusque Mistflier]], on Rori|<ref name="Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''</ref>}}
'''Narmlé''' was an ancient [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|King]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] whose short-lived reign took place around [[2032 BBY]]. Known as "the Explorer," King Narmlé colonized Naboo's [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]].

Narmlé was widely regarded as a charming and intelligent [[Gender/Legends|man]]. He was a restless [[Scout/Legends|explorer]] who spent most of his time on distant [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] searching for new vistas. The [[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo Royal Advisory Council]] eventually suggested that Narmlé relinquish his throne and become an [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] instead. Before Narmlé left office as king, he planned the construction of a new settlement on the Nabooian moon of Rori. He envisioned Rori becoming an active agricultural hub one day, supplying food and medicines to other neighboring planets. However, Rori attracted only few settlers. Frustrated, Narmlé left Rori and vanished into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] forever.

By [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the [[City/Legends|city]] he had helped build still bore his name, [[Narmle (city)|Narmle]].
